# BEV

**Path:** `global_descriptor/handcrafted/bev`

Handcrafted global descriptors derived from bird's-eye-view or polar BEV representations.

## Scope

**Include:** polar height image; BEV signature

**Exclude:** learned BEV CNN embeddings
